en.name: Pattern Memory
en.desc: Memorize colorful grid patterns! Study the pattern, then recreate it from memory. Difficulty increases with grid size. Visual memory training!
en.howToPlay: Watch the colored pattern appear on the grid. When it disappears, click cells to recreate the exact pattern. Each level adds more complexity.
tips: Use mnemonic devices like creating shapes or stories
Focus on one area at a time

zh.name: 图案记忆
zh.desc: 记忆彩色网格图案！观察图案，然后凭记忆重新创建。难度随网格大小增加。视觉记忆训练！
zh.howToPlay: 观看高亮格子的序列。点击相同的格子重复序列。每个新回合增加一个格子。按错格子或顺序错误则游戏结束。
tips: 在心里将图案分组记忆
使用空间关联（如对角线、角落）
练习以提高你的视觉记忆
